resources.string: How to start chatting? Open the app and tap the + button to discover nearby devices. Once connected, tap on a peer to start chatting.
How to send messages? Type your message in the text field at the bottom and tap Send. You can also attach images, videos, or files.
How to change my name? Go to Settings → Display Name, enter your new name, and tap Save.
Why can\'t I find peers? Ensure Wi-Fi is enabled and both devices are on the same network. Make sure you\'re visible in Settings.
How does P2P work? Messages are sent directly between devices without any server. All communication happens over local network.
Are my messages private? Messages are sent directly peer-to-peer. For enhanced privacy, avoid using on public networks.
Can I hide from discovery? Yes, go to Settings → Privacy and turn off \"Visible to Others\".
Messages not sending? Check your network connection. Failed messages are queued and will retry automatically.
App crashing? Try clearing app data in Settings → Storage → Clear Data, or reinstall the app.
Meshify is a decentralized P2P messaging app built with privacy in mind.
A decentralized peer-to-peer messaging app for secure, private communication without servers.
Built by Jo with contributions from the open-source community.
P2P messaging, LAN discovery, offline queue, multi-attachment support, and Material 3 design.
Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Material 3, Room Database, Coroutines & Flow.
View source code, report issues, and contribute
Learn how we protect your data
